name: python3-msldap
title: python3-msldap
summary: LDAP library for auditing MS AD (Python 3)
description:
LDAP library for auditing MS AD (Python 3)
This package contains an LDAP library for auditing MS AD.
- Comes with a built-in console LDAP client
- All parameters can be conrolled via a conveinent URL (see below)
- Supports integrated windows authentication
- Supports SOCKS5 proxy without the need of extra proxifyer
- Minimal footprint
- A lot of pre-built queries for convenient information polling
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use msldap because LDAP library for auditing MS AD (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use msldap as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `msldap [options] [args]` as documented upstream for msldap.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair msldap with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `msldap --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
